description: Google Cloud Private Catalog, part of Service Catalog, lets organizations make approved solutions discoverable to internal enterprise users. The service is exposed as a Google Cloud API under the `cloudprivatecatalog.googleapis.com` domain.
summary: Google Cloud Private Catalog exposes a documented REST API at `https://cloudprivatecatalog.googleapis.com`, authenticated with Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 bearer access tokens; no separate GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found for this service domain.
